# circleci_organization (Resource)

Manages a CircleCI organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the CircleCI organization.
- `vcs_type` (String) The VCS type of the CircleCI organization (e.g., github, bitbucket, circleci).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique ID of the CircleCI organization.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the CircleCI organization.
